---
title: "A micro-longitudinal study of naps, sleep disturbance, and headache severity in women with chronic migraine"
authors: "Ong, J., Dawson, S., Taylor, H., Park, M., Burgess, H., Crawford, M., Rains, J., Smitherman, T., Espie, C., Jones, A. L., & Wyatt, J."
year: 2022
date: 2022-01-01
pub-journal: "Behavioural Sleep Medicine"
doi: "10.1080/15402002.2022.2050723"
pdf: "assets/papers/2022/ongetal2022.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
